sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2025-03-30 13:05
- Distance: 19.7 km
- Moving time: 2:35:01
- Elapsed time: 2:38:30
- Elevation gain: 257.6 m
- Average heart rate: 156.3 bpm
- Max heart rate: 183 bpm
- Average watts: 153 W
- Average speed: 7.6 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `11` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `150.7 bpm`, ranging from `129.0` to `175.0 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `154.2 bpm` and second-half average HR was `147.8 bpm` (-6.4 bpm), which came down late rather than drifting upward.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `142.0 spm`, with a working range of `107.5` to `161.9 spm` after excluding `10` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `157.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `126.8 spm` (-30.2 spm), which suggests some late turnover fade.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:51 /km` across `19.746 km` in `2:35:01` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:58 /km` and second-half pace was `8:44 /km` (+106 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `156.3 bpm` average and `183 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `152.8 bpm` in the first half and `160.1 bpm` in the second (+7.4 bpm), which shows a modest late rise in aerobic cost.

- Moving time was `2:35:01` out of `2:38:30` elapsed (97.8%), which shows only minor interruption cost.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `70` stop segments and `15.7%` stationary samples, so the route included repeated interruptions.

- Strava logged about `301.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `3.8 m` and `41.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `122.4 m` in the first half and `179.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
